title: how can i separate container overlay and image overlay dir in rootless mode?
body:
i wanna to limit rootfs size for a container in rootless mode using lvm and build new image ，however for large modify within container ， build image always failed as ```no space left on device```

step 1:  create lvs device  ```/home/user04/vol1``` quota size is 1G

step 2: modify storage.conf 
```
[storage]
driver = "overlay"
graphroot = "/home/user04/vol1"

[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = ["/opt/containers/storage"]

[storage.options.overlay]
mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
```

step 3: create a container
```
sudo -u user04 podman run -it -d --network=none  --name=test12 docker.io/library/ollama-qwen3:1.7b
```

step 4:  add 900MiB files within test12 container
```
sudo -u user04 podman exec -it test12 /bin/bash
dd if=/dev/zero of=/ccc bs=900MiB count=1
```

step 5:  commit a new image named ```docker.io/library/test12:v1```,  however it can not work
```
sudo -u user04 podman commit 76da6429a230 docker.io/library/test12:v1

Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 470b66ea5123 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob f8774a5d2593 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 337ddc4ba2c7 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 6b772d504594 skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 9afecb25982f skipped: already exists  
Copying blob 81a163338a85 done   | 
Error: copying layers and metadata for container "76da6429a230ffacbbb09487cc8cf105f7a9f2ba0b20254ac954a6d92b8f58f7": writing blob: adding layer with blob "sha256:81a163338a85b9adf1fd7c7729ccf8156a597c9e0bf5b3464bb1d92c7bc18a5e"/""/"sha256:81a163338a85b9adf1fd7c7729ccf8156a597c9e0bf5b3464bb1d92c7bc18a5e": unpacking failed (error: exit status 1; output: write /ccc: no space left on device)
```

the reason for step 5 failed is lvs device size is 1GiB, and  i add 900MiB file to container,  now test12 container diff is 900MiB,  but ``` docker.io/library/test12:v1``` image need  900MiB space, so the total size is 900MiB+900MiB is more than lvs device size 

i don't want to build user04 image to ```/home/user04/vol1``` where the container stand on ，because it always failed for large modify

 am i missing somthing or how can i do to resolve it？
